中國文化大學保障境外新生入學後前2年的校內住宿!

本校宿舍設備完善，除無線網路設備之外，均配有飲水機、洗衣機、烘衣機、脫水機、交誼廳、學習中心、公共浴廁、配膳間(檯)、室內曬衣場(廊)及自動販賣機，提供學生完善方便的宿舍生活。各宿舍出入口均有門禁管制且設有值班宿舍管理員，保障學生居住安全。

※宿舍介紹相關網址：https://reurl.cc/89YLj7

※有關「新生申請宿舍」問題，請聯繫本校學生事務處生活輔導組陳淑珍老師：scchen@ulive.pccu.edu.tw，電話+886-2-28610511 ext.12106，或 國際暨兩岸事務處王青老師：cufoa@dep.pccu.edu.tw，電話+886-2-28610511 ext.18101。
dormitory.info_en:
For New-coming students, Chinese Culture University guarantees on-campus accommodation for their first two years of enrollment at CCU!

Our dormitories are well-equipped with water dispensers, washing machines, clothes dryers, lounge, study center, public bathrooms, dining rooms, and vending machines, in addition to wireless Internet access, to provide students with a complete and convenient dormitory life. Access control systems are installed at all dormitory entrances and exits, with on-duty dormitory managers ensuring students' safety.

※Related Websites for Dormitory Information：https://reurl.cc/89YLj7

※For “university accommodation” inquiries, please contact Ms. Shu-Chen Chen of the Student Counseling Section of the Department of Student Affairs by email: "scchen@ulive.pccu.edu.tw" or by phone: +886-2-28610511 ext.12106 or Ms. Qing Wang of the Office of International and Mainland China Affairs by email: "cufoa@dep.pccu.edu.tw" or by phone: +886-2-28610511 ext.18101.

dormitory.info_en: As an international student, you can apply for on-campus accommodation during your study at CGU. The application process is the same whether you are an international student or a domestic student. The campus student dormitories consist of five buildings with a total capacity of 6,145 beds, ensuring 100% bed availability for all enrolled students. Undergraduate dormitories are all quadruples, equipped with an independent bathroom, fan, internal phone, and air conditioning (pay-per-use). Each room also provides a personal desk (with a desk lamp), bookshelf, wardrobe, and internet access. The dormitories are equipped with a lounge, study room (with 24-hour internet access), laundry room, public bathroom, kitchenette, vending machines, and a convenience store. Mingde Building also has a gym for students to exercise and stay fit during their leisure time. There are dedicated dormitory supervisors who provide 24-hour security and life guidance for students. The campus offers convenient and comprehensive facilities for student life, including a shuttle bus connecting to the MRT station, and late-night food trucks.

新生保障住宿 ; 詳情逕洽本校國際事務中心。
填寫本校為第一志願並獲錄取進入本校就讀者，住宿本校四人房宿舍得補助全額住宿費。

本校目前計有學生第一、第二宿舍，為地下一樓、地上七樓之男女生綜合宿舍，第一宿舍全棟計有170間4人雅房，設有公共衛浴及廁所，第二宿全棟計有240間4人套房，房間內均有獨立衛浴。另各宿舍房間內均有分離式冷氣、ADSL網路，以及電話，各樓層也都設有洗衣間及交誼廳，一樓設有管理中心、服務中心，宿舍地下一樓提供豐富完善的公共休憩空間，讓學生有更多元化的娛樂選擇，針對住宿生基本的民生需求，學校也規劃完善、寬廣的學生餐廳，供應中西式餐點，此外中庭另有闢建綠地，以提供優質的住宿生活。宿舍內聘有專任輔導老師，為住宿生提供24小時服務；另成立宿舍自治幹部，每日協助輔導老師實施各項宿舍管理工作。

學生住宿期間將由宿舍幹部舉辦各項活動，如迎新活動、宿舍生活週、宿舍徵文比賽、宿舍整潔及美化環境比賽、球類比賽、及歲末聯歡晚會。此外為豐富住宿學生之夜間休閒生活，學務處將定期邀請國內知名表演團體及校內知名社團，於顏文隆國際會議廳舉辦各項藝文活動與電影欣賞，藉由多元的休閒活動，使學生享受更精彩的住宿生活。

一宿: NTD 27,000元/學年 (4 人房共用衛浴)
二宿: NTD 33,000元/學年 (4 人房每間房有獨立衛浴設備)

dormitory.info_en:
School Dormitories
Our school dormitories are divided into Gratitude Hall, Blessing Hall, Dreamweaver Hall, and Summit Hall. Most of our dorm rooms accommodate four students and feature bunk beds, excellent natural light, and ventilation. The dormitories are equipped with public facilities to meet the students' needs.
Facilities in the Dormitories: Bed, desk, chair, wardrobe, bookshelf, telephone, air conditioner, curtains.
Note: Double rooms are only available for graduate students.
Gratitude Hall (Female Dorm):
Double Room: 14,300 NTD
Quad Room: 12,500 NTD
Blessing Hall (Female Dorm):
Double Room: 14,300 NTD
Quad Room: 12,500 NTD
Dreamweaver Hall (Female Dorm):
Double Room: 14,300 NTD
Quad Room: 12,500 NTD
Summit Hall (International Dorm):
Quad Room: 12,500 NTD
Prices are in New Taiwan Dollars (NTD). Note: The above fees do not include electricity charges, accommodation deposits, and fees for winter/summer vacations.
Electricity Charge (Per Semester): 500 NTD
Accommodation Deposit: 1,000 NTD
Note: Electricity charge is 500 NTD per person per semester. The 1,000 NTD deposit will be refunded after completing one academic year (both semesters), except in cases of leave of absence, withdrawal, or internship.
Additional Information:
1.	Accommodation fees during winter and summer vacations will incur extra charges.
•	For on-campus students: 150 NTD per night, unless you are an on-campus work-study/internship/research participant, in which case it's 75 NTD per night. 
•	For off-campus students: Accommodation is only available for approved camp participants at a rate of 300 NTD per night.
2.	In general, one semester at our school consists of 18 weeks. Accommodation fees will be refunded as follows: 2/3 of the fee will be refunded for weeks 1 to 6, and 1/3 of the fee will be refunded for weeks 7 to 12. No refunds will be issued starting from week 13. (Please note: For students who do not complete one academic year, the accommodation deposit will not be refunded, except for cases of leave, withdrawal, transfer, or internship.)
3.	During check-out, the dormitory room must be returned in clean condition, including personal spaces, wardrobes, beds, and common areas. Failure to do so will result in a deduction of 1,000 NTD from the accommodation deposit.

申請方式: 在確認入學後，新生可在回覆就讀意願時，同時回覆是否想要住宿於臺北科技大學宿舍。
dormitory.info_en: Taipei Tech Dormitories include different residence halls that are situated on campus as well as various locations around the Taipei City and New Taipei City areas. The average traveling time from Taipei Tech Dormitories that are situated at other locations to the campus is approximately 35 minutes via Taipei Metro.  Four people per room. Each room is equipped with a telephone and internet service. Dormitory fees (around NT$5,000) must be paid at the beginning of each semester and do not include the cost of staying during winter and summer breaks. New students are eligible to apply to reside at Taipei Tech Dormitories for the first two years. All new international students who have applied for Taipei Tech Dormitories will be allocated to the On-campus Dormitory for the first year. For the second year, male students who have applied for Taipei Tech Dormitories will be allocated to the residence hall at the Off-campus Dormitory, a.k.a. Xinbei Dormitory. Females will be allocated to Nangang Dormitory.  Residence spaces at Taipei Tech Dormitories from the 3rd year onwards will be decided by lottery and not guaranteed to all. Students entering their 3rd year of study should be prepared to reside elsewhere. The decision of residence hall allocation rests with Taipei Tech.

The dormitory provides twin rooms and quad rooms with desks, chairs, beds, closets, shared bathroom facilities, air-conditioners. Electricity in the room (including air-conditioning expenses) is counted separately.
The dormitory in Taoyuan Campus provides quad rooms with beds, closets, shoe cabinets, desks, chairs, lights, air conditioning, electric fans and internet etc. There are also 24-hour dormitory administrator managing accommodation affairs. To provide students with a convenient and comfortable living environment, the dormitory is well ventilating and lighting, and an open green courtyard is also included.

dormitory.info_en: We offer 829 beds, including 427 beds for female and 402 beds for male. Magazines and newspapers are available in the reception room on the first floor. There are study rooms and student lounges with cable TV on each floor. Cafeteria and snack shop are available on the first floor. Access control and surveillance systems are controlled by EasyCard. Dormitory is equipped with monitors, automatic lighting, fire extinguishers, fire hydrants and descent machines. On-site laundry facility and fridge are available on each floor. Each room contains air conditioner and internet access with single-size bed.

2. The dormitory of our school is a newly built  with four to six-person air-conditioned  suite or shared bathroom room with individual beds, desks, and wardrobes. Each floor has an independent access control system, and the bathroom is separated into dry and wet or shared bathroom.
3.Each floor is equipped with laundry room of self-washing,drying equipment, pantry, social room and clothes drying area.
4. Supervisors are provided for dormitory guidance.Social festivals and gatherings and held for dormitory students to foster friendship.
5. The dormitory is with complete facilities and good view. It provides students with a safe and comfortable high-quality accommodation environment.
6. The dormitory  fee, starting from NT$10,000 for a semester (quadruple to sextuple room);(excluding security deposit NT$1,000 and monthly Air-conditioning and electricity expenses).

dormitory.info_cht:
1.由本校安排專人管理，學校共有五棟學生宿舍，可容納學生逾2500人住宿，宿舍乾淨明亮，配套措施齊全，有中央空調、開飲機、洗衣機、脫水機、網際網路、消防設備、室內接聽電話、交誼廳、卡拉OK室等。交誼廳設有電鍋，提供同學加熱食物。
2.宿舍管理：不論上課或實習期間可安排住於校園內的宿含，宿舍生活管理上除有舍務員外，亦有自治幹部，而本校已聘有熟悉越南語及印尼語的輔導人員協助管理。宿舍生活訂有「宿舍自治公約」，亦對學生進行每日歸宿點名，確實掌握學生生活作息狀況。
dormitory.info_en:
Dormitory Arrangements and Management
1.The school has five student dormitories, each with dedicated manage-ment. They can accommodate over 2,500 students. The dormitories are clean and bright, and fully equipped with central air conditioning, a water dispenser, washing machine, dryer, internet access, fire alarms, in-room tel-ephones, a lounge, and a karaoke room. The lounge is equipped with an electric cooker for students to heat up their food.
2. Dormitory Management: Students can live in on-campus dormitories, whether attending classes or during internships. Dormitory management is provided by both housekeepers and self-government officers. The school also employs counselors fluent in Vietnamese and Indonesian to assist with management. A "Dormitory Self-Government Charter" is established for dormitory life, and daily roll calls are conducted to ensure a thorough understanding of student living habits.

新生保障住宿

● 公共設施：一樓會客大廳、二樓多功能廳視聽休閒區、三樓會議討論區、四樓視聽休閒區、五樓閱讀區、五樓閱讀室，投幣式洗衣機及烘衣機、脫水機、飲水機、電鍋、微波爐。
● 寢室設備：床、衣櫃、書桌、冷氣、宿舍網路(需自備網路線)。相關寢具用品請自行購買。
dormitory.info_en:
We provide dormitory accommodations for students. Overseas students have the priority for dormitory accommodations. 
● Dorm Housing: The dormitories of Chu An Hall are mainly for undergraduate students. There are studio rooms available for 5 people, rooms for 6 to 8 people, as well as dorm rooms for students with disabilities. Because freshmen are not familiar with their new environment, we aim to reduce their level of inconvenience by renting them rooms on campus. Therefore, there are rooms reserved for freshman applications. However, students must fill out applications in the Student Dorm Management section of the Academic Affairs System in the required time. If there are more freshmen applicants than the number of the reserved dorm spaces, draws will be conducted to select which applicants receive rooms. Determination of qualification for returning students will be decided by draw every academic year.
● Dorm Public Facilities: Dorm facilities include: The main hall on the first floor(1F), a multifunction audio-visual area on the second floor(2F), a conference discussion area on the third floor(3F), an audio-visual area on the fourth floor(4F), and a reading area (rooms) on the fifth floor(5F). There are also coin-operated washing machines and dryers, spin dryers, water dispensers, steam cookers and microwave ovens.

每學期住宿費用
項目/新台幣
學校宿舍∕$9,300 ~ 20,000
校外租屋∕$24,000 ~ 30,000

註：
1. 學生進住及搬離宿舍的時間均依照學校行事曆之時程。校外住宿通常以六個月為期。

dormitory.info_en:

Accommodation costs per semester
Project/New Taiwan Dollar
School dormitory / NTD9,300 ~ 20,000
Off-campus rental / NTD24,000 ~ 30,000
Living expenses / NTD34,000 ~ 40,000
Note:
1. The time for students to move in and out of the dormitory is in accordance with the school calendar. Off-campus housing usually lasts for six months.
2. Personal living expenses do not include clothing, entertainment, travel and transportation expenses.
The above cost estimates are assessed for academic year 113 (2024-2025) and may vary slightly for academic year 114 (2025-2026), depending on individual cost differences.
3. The Administrative Yuan accommodation exemption is limited to local students, with the exemption of NTD5,000 for ordinary students and NTD7,000 for middle and low-income students.

According to personal needs, there are four-person rooms, six-person rooms and rooms for disabilities. The dormitories are equipped with air-conditioning, audio-visual rooms, social rooms, reading rooms, billiards and video game areas, KTV, dancing classrooms, cooking areas, sports and leisure areas, and other facilities. The dormitories are managed by dedicated personnel who also organize multiple activities to create a peaceful and high-quality ideal dormitory and create a warm living and learning environment.
2.Dormitory fee (include air conditioning fee): NTD 9,500/per semester (NTD 9,000 for accommodation fee and NTD 500 for air conditioning fee)
3.In order to facilitate the accommodation to campus life, every students in the first year of YDU are required to live on campus according to Dormitory Management policy.
